summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Reminder System feature. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed: Reminders page loads correctly, stats cards display, tabs work, CRUD operations (create/mark complete/delete) function properly, and Dashboard shows 'Today's Reminders' widget. Fixed 1 bug: SelectItem empty value error in Add Reminder modal.

design_issues.issue: Missing aria-describedby attribute for accessibility (console warning)

bugs_fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing runtime error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed entity_type Select to use 'none' as value instead of empty string, with conversion logic in onValueChange handler

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 'Test Follow-up Reminder' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reminder System fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_reminders.py cover: GET /api/reminders/today, POST /api/reminders (all types: follow_up, birthday, anniversary, custom), GET /api/reminders with filters, POST /api/reminders/{id}/complete, DELETE /api/reminders/{id}, PUT /api/reminders/{id}, entity linking (doctor/medical/agency), WhatsApp summary endpoint. Frontend verified: sidebar navigation to Reminders, stats cards (Today, Follow-ups, Birthdays, Anniversaries, Custom), tabs (Today's Reminders, All Reminders), Add Reminder modal with all fields, Mark Complete action, Delete with confirmation modal, Dashboard 'Today's Reminders' widget with navigation.

backend_api.get_today_reminders: PASS - Returns date, total_count, reminders array with correct structure
backend_api.create_follow_up: PASS - Creates follow-up reminder with all fields
backend_api.create_custom: PASS - Creates custom reminder with optional time
backend_api.create_with_entity: PASS - Creates reminder linked to doctor/medical/agency
backend_api.get_all_reminders: PASS - Returns list of all reminders
backend_api.delete_reminder: PASS - Deletes reminder and returns 404 on re-fetch
backend_api.whatsapp_summary: PASS - Endpoint exists (returns 400 if not configured)

frontend_ui.reminders_page: PASS - Renders with header, stats cards, tabs, table
frontend_ui.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Today, Follow-ups, Birthdays, Anniversaries, Custom counts
frontend_ui.today_tab: PASS - Shows today's reminders with badge count
frontend_ui.add_reminder_modal: PASS - Opens with Title, Description, Type, Priority, Date, Time, Link to Contact fields
frontend_ui.create_reminder: PASS - Creates reminder and shows success toast
frontend_ui.mark_complete: PASS - Marks reminder complete and updates stats
frontend_ui.delete_reminder: PASS - Shows confirmation modal, deletes, shows success toast

dashboard_integration.today_reminders_widget: PASS - Shows when reminders exist with count and preview

sidebar_navigation.reminders_link: PASS - Visible in sidebar and navigates to /reminders

whatsapp_integration_note: WhatsApp integration sends to external API (BotMasterSender). Actual message delivery cannot be verified in test environment. The 'Send to Admin' button triggers manual WhatsApp summary send. Daily background task runs at scheduled time (cannot be tested directly).
